title: Why AI Models Pause to Think: Test Time Compute Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains how test-time compute allows AI models to pause and perform additional computation during inference, improving problem-solving accuracy. The video covers chain of thought and reasoning models as mechanisms for deliberate thinking in LLMs.
